chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-2104 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.08.2025. Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Azar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, APG Sindh. Since the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and a proviso for bail has been inserted in the Act and an alternate remedy is now provided, therefore, this petition is disposed of. The petitioner is at liberty to approach the trial Court for appropriate relief in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq ps
